LanguageData.AmbrosiaHigh.stages.0.description: The punga fruit makes me feel relaxed and energized, a rare comfort in the wastes.
LanguageData.AmbrosiaHigh.stages.0.label: punga warmth
LanguageData.AmbrosiaWithdrawal.stages.1.description: I feel heavy and cold all the time. I never thought I'd want a piece of punga fruit so much.
LanguageData.AmbrosiaWithdrawal.stages.1.label: punga withdrawal
